name: NOVAVAX INC
summary: PART I Overview Novavax, Inc., together with our wholly owned subsidiaries, tackles some of the worlds most pressing health challenges with its scientific expertise in vaccines and its proven technology platform, including its Matrix-M adjuvant and protein-based nanoparticles.
